info.title: LANDR Mastering Api

post.description:
When successful, the request returns a 202 Accepted.
The body of the response contains the id of the master and a url to poll in order to fetch the status of the master. \
\
nb. For staging clients, no actual master will be performed. The flow is simulated over 10 seconds resulting in a dummy audio file.  \
\
Rate Limits: 50 requests per hour

x-codeSamples.source:
curl -si -X POST \
    --url 'https://api.landr.com/mastering/v1/master/single' \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -H 'x-landr-mastering-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY' \
    -d '{ "inputUri": "<input_uri>", "format": "cd", "loudness": "low", "style":"balanced" }'

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique id of the master.

404.description: Returned if the unique id does not refer to an existing master.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl -si \
    --url 'https://api.landr.com/mastering/v1/master/single/a0f3e327-3bea-4764-9d95-1bc1936f2297/status' \
    -H 'x-landr-mastering-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY'

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique id of the master.

404.description: Returned when the master does not exist yet. The status of the master is not `completed`.

410.description: Returned if the mastered track has been removed. The status of the master is `expired`.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl -si \
    --url 'https://api.landr.com/mastering/v1/master/single/a0f3e327-3bea-4764-9d95-1bc1936f2297/download' \
    -H 'x-landr-mastering-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY'

post.description:
The created preview will always be an MP3 file. \
\
When successful, the request returns a 202 Accepted. The body of the response contains the id of the preview being processed and a url to poll in order to fetch the status of the preview. \
\
nb. For staging clients, no actual preview will be performed. The flow is simulated over 10 seconds resulting in a dummy audio file.  \
\
Rate Limits: 50 requests per hour

x-codeSamples.source:
curl -si -X POST \
    --url 'https://api.landr.com/mastering/v1/preview/single' \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -H 'x-landr-mastering-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY' \
    -d '{ "inputUri": "<input_uri>",  "loudness": "low", "style":"balanced" }'

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique id of the preview.

404.description: Returned if the id does not refer to an existing preview.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl -si \
    --url 'https://api.landr.com/mastering/v1/preview/single/a0f3e327-3bea-4764-9d95-1bc1936f2297/status' \
    -H 'x-landr-mastering-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY'

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique id of the preview.

404.description: Returned when the preview does not exist yet. The status of the preview is not `completed`.

410.description: Returned if the preview has been removed. The status of the preview is `expired`.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl -si \
    --url 'https://api.landr.com/mastering/v1/preview/single/a0f3e327-3bea-4764-9d95-1bc1936f2297/download' \
    -H 'x-landr-mastering-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY'

post.description: After configuration, LANDR will notify you when a master or preview is complete by sending a message at the configured endpoint.

400.description: Returned if the request contained validation errors.

409.description: Returned if the webhook is already configured.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl -si -X POST \
    --url 'https://api.landr.com/mastering/v1/webhook' \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -H 'x-landr-mastering-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY' \
    -d '{ "url": "<url>", "enabled": true }'

put.description: Update the Url or disable the webhook.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl -si -X PUT \
    --url 'https://api.landr.com/mastering/v1/webhook' \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -H 'x-landr-mastering-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY' \
    -d '{ "enabled": true }'

curl -si \
    --url 'https://api.landr.com/mastering/v1/webhook' \
    -H 'x-landr-mastering-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY'

post.description: Generates a new signing secret for the webhook. The old secret is expired immediately.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl -si -X POST \
    --url 'https://api.landr.com/mastering/v1/webhook/secret' \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -H 'x-landr-mastering-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY'

id.description: The unique id of the master.

location.description: The path of the url to poll to get the status of the master.

inputUri.description: Uri of the audio file to master.

loudness.description:
The desired loudness for the master. If empty, a default is automatically computed. \
Expected values: \
`low`: Preserves acoustic work with gentler and more subtle masters. \
`medium`: The most dynamic and versatile mastering option. Great for commercial work. \
`high`: Get maximum loudness, while still preserving details.

style.description:
The desired mastering style. Default is `balanced`. \
Expected values: \
`warm`: Vintage warmth with softer compression for thick, smooth sound. \
`balanced`: Controlled, with a focus on balance, clarity and depth. \
`open`: Modern, open sound with emphasis on punch and presence.

format.description:
The desired format. Default is `wav`. \
Expected values: \
`cd`: CD quality. A wav audio file with a sample rate of 44.1kHz and bit depth of 16 bit.\
`mp3`: An mp3 audio file encoded at 320kbps.\
`wav`: A wav audio file preserving the input’s sample rate and bit depth.

id.description: The unique id of the master.

status.description:
The status of the master. \
    Possible values are:\
`downloading`: The input file is being downloaded on our server.\
`processing`: The master is still processing.\
`completed`: The master has finished. At this point, `/master/single/{id}/download` can be called.\
`failed`: The mastering process has failed.\
`expired`: The master has been removed from LANDR storage. At this point, calling `/master/single/{id}/download` will return a `410 Gone`.

error.description: Gives information about the reason of the failure. The property is filled only when `status` is `failed`. It is null otherwise.

id.description: The unique id of the master.

downloadUrl.description: The url where the master can be downloaded.

id.description: The unique id of the preview.

location.description: The path of the url to poll to get the status of the preview.

inputUri.description: The uri of the audio file to preview.

loudness.description:
The desired loudness for the preview. If empty, a default is automatically computed. \
Expected values: \
`low`: Preserves acoustic work with gentler and more subtle masters. \
`medium`: The most dynamic and versatile mastering option. Great for commercial work. \
`high`: Get maximum loudness, while still preserving details.

style.description:
The desired mastering style. Default is `balanced`. \
Expected values: \
`warm`: Vintage warmth with softer compression for thick, smooth sound. \
`balanced`: Controlled, with a focus on balance, clarity and depth. \
`open`: Modern, open sound with emphasis on punch and presence.

id.description: The unique id of the preview.

status.description:
The status of the preview. \
    Possible values are:\
`downloading`: The input file is being downloaded on our server.\
`processing`: the preview is still processing.\
`completed`: the preview has finished. At this point, `/preview/single/{id}/download` can be called.\
`failed`: the preview process has failed.\
`expired`: the preview has been removed from LANDR storage. At this point, calling `/preview/single/{id}/download` will return a `410 Gone`.

error.description: Gives information about the reason of the failure. The property is filled only when `status` is `failed`. It is null otherwise.

url.description:
Endpoint at which you would be notified about a completed master or preview. \
The url scheme must be https. The endpoint must be publicly accessible.

Endpoint at which you would be notified about a completed master or preview. \
The url scheme must be https. The endpoint must be publicly accessible.

Api Key.description: Every request made to the LANDR Mastering API, the `x-landr-mastering-api-key` header of the request must contain the client's unique API KEY.
Api Key.name: x-landr-mastering-api-key
